name: hospitality-os-plugin
description: Reusable Codex operating system for hospitality sales, outreach, events, finance, marketing, operations, training, guest experience, and multilingual video production, with a BOSSA Asado i Mar specialization layer.

interface.shortDescription: Run sales, delivery, market, revenue, guest, and video workflows for hospitality brands.
interface.longDescription: Hospitality OS gives Codex reusable skills for restaurants, boutique hotels, beach clubs, catering teams, tourist experiences, multilingual video production, and BOSSA Asado i Mar operations.
defaultPrompt: Create this week's AI brief for BOSSA.
Build a hospitality SOP from these notes.
Review this menu for revenue upside.
Draft a partnership outreach message for a local hotel.
Build a catering quote for a 40-guest event.
Create a multilingual digital-avatar video package for a hospitality campaign.
Create a new fire-grill dish for BOSSA Asado i Mar.
Build a Fire Box take-home bundle for BOSSA.
Draft a WhatsApp reply for a BOSSA reservation request.
Build BOSSA's owner dashboard for this week.
